subcodes.first_line: O nightingale in the garden of Divine Unity! Blessed art thou, for thou hast warbled in the meadows of mystic knowledge with wondrous melody [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها العندلیب فی حدیقه التوحید طوبی لک بما تغنیت فی ریاض العرفان بابدع
subcodes.subjects: @the concourse on high, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @music and singing, @praise and encouragement, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
